title: Vivi Joins the Straw Hats
description: On pages 13–16, vivi joins the straw hats as the crew accepts Vivi’s desperate mission, and a mysterious senior agent reminds them how dangerous Baroque Works really is.
scene: Vivi Joins the Straw Hats. The crew accepts Vivi’s desperate mission, and a mysterious senior agent reminds them how dangerous Baroque Works really is. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: I can't believe I had to cut a freakin' booger!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Why do you have to come and block my way now of all times!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ahh!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Calm down, I've come to save you.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: WHA...

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Save me?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Hey...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So what exactly,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Is Baroque works?

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: It's a secret criminal organization in which not a single member knows the name nor the real identity of our boss.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Under the boss' orders,

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: We carry out tasks ranging from intelligence gathering, assassination, robbery, and bounty hunting.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why do the members of Baroque works bother to listen to this boss,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: When they don't even know his name or identity?

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: The final objective of Baroque works,

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: is the creation of an ideal nation.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Those who bring success to our organization,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: shall be granted high-ranking positions in this ideal nation by the boss.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The boss goes by the codename, "Mr. O"... the lower an officer agent's number is,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The higher their status will be in this ideal nation...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But more importantly, the stronger they will be as well...!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Especially for agents with the number 5 or less, their strength is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Abnormal.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Ahh, that feels better.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Time to go back to sleep.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Whaaaaat!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Oh, you're the swordsman who defeated all the low-ranking agents in this town, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Why would someone like you be trying to protect Alabasta's Princess?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I have my own circumstances.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Well,

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: whatever.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: you're in our way in any case.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: KYAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! That's right. Since you're in our way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Allow me to bury your face under the ground with my ability.

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on vivi joins the straw hats. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
